prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "9B. Other Information" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 15. Exhibits, Financial Statement Schedules".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 9B's text:
- If the "Item 15" heading is visible on this page, Item 9B ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 9B runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 9B at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text: The Company has an insider trading policy ("Insider Trading Policy") that governs the purchase, sale and other dispositions of Walmart securities by its directors, officers, associates and the Company itself. The Insider Trading Policy states, among other things, that our directors, officers and associates are prohibited from trading in such securities while in possession of material, nonpublic information. The Company is also prohibited from trading in Walmart securities while in possession of material, nonpublic information related to the Company unless such trading activity complies with all applicable securities laws. The Company believes the Insider Trading Policy is reasonably designed to promote compliance with insider trading laws, rules and regulations, and any applicable Nasdaq listing standards. The foregoing summary of our Insider Trading Policy does not purport to be complete and is qualified by reference to the Insider Trading Policy filed as Exhibit 19 to this Annual Report on Form 10-K.
